name: Configuration precedence research
prompt: Research how configuration precedence and validation work in this repository. Return a compact evidence brief with file references. Do not edit files.

name: Ambiguous audit logging design
prompt: We need better audit logging for authentication events. Explore the viable designs in this repository, recommend one, and stop for approval before implementation.

name: Bounded retry configuration
prompt: This plan is approved: add a maxRetries configuration value with default 3, allow user and project overrides through the existing precedence system, validate it as a non-negative integer, add focused tests, run the tests, and change only files required for this behavior.
verificationCommands: import { resolveConfig } from './src/config/index.js'; const value = resolveConfig({ user: { maxRetries: 4 }, project: { maxRetries: 2 } }); if (value.maxRetries !== 2) process.exit(1); try { resolveConfig({ project: { maxRetries: -1 } }); process.exit(1); } catch {}

name: Authentication diff review
prompt: Review the current working-tree authentication change for requirement violations and security defects. Report severity-ranked findings with file references. Do not edit files.
